title: Ombre gradient glaze dip on bisqueware
notes: Creating a top-to-bottom gradient by dipping the piece at a slight angle, rotating and re-dipping at different heights to layer glaze thinner at the top and thicker at the base, or by spraying from a different height. Two compatible glazes used that bleed into each other at the overlap zone. Cone 6. Also covers the single-colour fade (thick-at-base, wipe back at rim).
